svg.text: Visual Analytics of Cosmological Density Evolution
Figure 0. Dual-step comparison shows density enhancement in filaments and nodes.
Figure A. Evolution of the cosmic web over 100 time steps (log density MIPs).
Figure B. Strict T-web labels on the same z = 33 slice: void, sheet, filament, node.
Figure C. Density distribution fingerprint and global metric evolution.
Figure D. Power spectrum and large-scale connectivity evolution.
Figure E. Extracted skeleton and connected components of high-density structures.
Figure G. Real ray-cast volume states from four time steps.
Figure F. Interactive brushing links histogram selection, 3D structure rendering and statistics.
Data: 128^3 voxels, 100 time steps | Tools: WebGL2 / Three.js / D3 / Python
